notes: Live Admin GraphQL 2026-04 evidence for metaobjectDefinitionCreate rejecting both an existing standard-template type and an unresolved shopify-- reserved namespace type. Public 2026-04 returns NOT_AUTHORIZED at field ["definition"] with message "Not authorized. This type is reserved for use by another application." The delete guard branches for APP_CONFIG_MANAGED and STANDARD_METAOBJECT_DEFINITION_DEPENDENT_ON_APP are runtime-test-backed only: the public MetaobjectDefinition and StandardMetaobjectDefinitionTemplate schema slices do not expose app_config_managed, standard_template_id, or dependent_on_app metadata, and the current conformance shop exposes no other-app app-managed definition candidate. The fixture records that discovery result so the parity spec does not synthesize delete evidence.
